import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { CheckCircle, DollarSign, Clock, Star, ExternalLink, Filter, UserCheck, X, Search } from 'lucide-react'; import EmptyState from '../components/ui/EmptyState'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; import PlatformLayout from '../components/platform/PlatformLayout'; import StatCard from '../components/ui/StatCard'; import { StatusBadge, TypeBadge, Badge } from '../components/ui/Badge'; import Button from '../components/ui/Button'; import { useAuth } from '../App'; import { testerStats, availableTests, myApplications, earningsData } from '../data/mockData'; export default function TesterDashboard() { const { user } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('available'); const [bannerDismissed, setBannerDismissed] = useState(false); const showOnboardingBanner = user?.profileComplete === false && !bannerDismissed; return (
{/* Onboarding banner */} {showOnboardingBanner && (

Complete your tester profile

Finish onboarding to unlock higher-paying tests matched to your devices and skills.

)} {/* Profile strip */}
{user?.name?.split(' ').map((n) => n[0]).join('') || 'MJ'}

{user?.name}

{user?.rating}

{user?.email}

{user?.testsCompleted}

Tests Done

${testerStats.totalEarned.toLocaleString()}

Total Earned

{/* Stats */}
{/* Tabs */}
{[ { id: 'available', label: 'Available Tests' }, { id: 'my', label: 'My Applications' }, { id: 'earnings', label: 'Earnings' }, ].map((tab) => ( ))}
{/* Available tests */} {activeTab === 'available' && (

{availableTests.length} tests matching your profile

{availableTests.length === 0 && (
)}
{availableTests.map((test) => (

{test.name}

{test.company}

${test.compensation}

per test

{test.description}

{test.platforms.map((p) => ( ))}
{test.duration} {test.slotsTotal - test.slots} / {test.slotsTotal} spots filled Deadline: {test.deadline}
{/* Slots bar */}
))}
)} {/* My applications */} {activeTab === 'my' && (
{myApplications.map((app) => ( ))}
Test Type Status Progress Compensation Due

{app.testName}

{app.company}
{app.progress}%
${app.compensation} {app.dueDate}
)} {/* Earnings chart */} {activeTab === 'earnings' && (

Earnings History

Last 6 months

[`$${v}`, 'Earned']} contentStyle={{ borderRadius: '10px', border: '1px solid #e2e8f0', fontSize: 12 }} />

$580

This Month

$3,842

All Time

$145

Pending Payout

)}
); }
